notes: Runs perfectly after applying the tweaks mentioned further down
title: Anno 1404

notes: Black screen with a cursor. I can hear the intros playing and main menu music, but nothing on the screen.
title: Anno 1404

notes:
Edit: <your steamAppsDir>/common/Anno\ 1404/Engine.ini and add between <InitFile> </InitFile> following line: <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> 
Then DirectX must be installed into the Wine directory of the game (export WINEPREFIX=<your steamAppsDir>/compatdata/33350/pfx). wine64 <your steamAppsDir>/common/Anno\ 1404/DirectX/DXSETUP.exe
Don't forget to change your wine back to ~/.wine
title: Anno 1404

notes: Just modify /steamapps/compatdata/33250/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/Ubisoft/Anno1404/Config/Engine.ini and set <DirectXVersion>0</DirectXVersion> to <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> and additional with start option PROTON_NO_D3D11=1
title: Anno 1404

notes:
The game ran fine, probably lucky with some reason posts not being great.
But if you do have problems there are some suggestions below
title: Anno 1404

notes: Added PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 to launch options and disabled dx3d11 in Engine.ini
title: Anno 1404

notes: works out of the box. Some fonts are ugly. Video at the beginning of a mission slightly stuttering, but audio is fine.

notes: Blackscreen. Tried to disable D3D11, added <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion>  to Engine.ini, manually installed DX9.
title: Anno 1404

notes: added <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> to Engine.ini and set launch options to "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" - introduction videos in campaign stuttering and overall performance not very good, but other than that working perfectly so far
title: Anno 1404

notes: Add <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> between <InitFile><\InitFile> in Engine.ini and set launch options to "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%". After that the game works pretty good although the performance is not too good and there is some stuttering in the in-game graphic campaign introduction videos.
title: Anno 1404

notes: I got the game to run by disabling D3d11 but the screen is black. I can hear the video playing in the beginning, and I can hear the seagulls in the main menu, but no image.
title: Anno 1404

notes: Forced DirectX 9 from Engine.ini and install DX9 from Microsoft's webpage.
title: Anno 1404

notes: Launch "Anno 1404" through "Anno 1404 : Venice" (Steam ask which game u want to launch) works perfectly out of the box :) One crash in 19 hours of play.
title: Anno 1404

notes: To get it running run the command: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/33350/pfx/ wine ~/.steam/s/steamapps/common/Anno\ 1404/DirectX/DXSETUP.exe to install DirectX9 manually. Add the line <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> before the line </InitFile> into the ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Anno\ 1404/Engine.ini file. Rightclick on Anno 1404 in your Steam library -> properties -> launch options -> add: PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%.
title: Anno 1404

notes: To launch the game run the command: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/33350/pfx/ wine ~/.steam/s/steamapps/common/Anno\ 1404/DirectX/DXSETUP.exe to install DirectX9 manually. Add the line <DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion> before the line </InitFile> into the ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Anno\ 1404/Engine.ini file. Rightclick on Anno 1404 in your Steam library -> properties -> launch options -> add: PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%.
title: Anno 1404

notes:
Launch options set through steam: "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 PROTON_NO_D3D10=1 %command%".
Modified "~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Anno\ 1404/Engine.ini" by adding the line "<DirectXVersion>9</DirectXVersion>" on the line below the first line "<InitFile>".
